holdings.infoBox: IQSZ is an equity ETF with a total of 512 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.88%, Apple at 4.46%, Microsoft at 2.57%, Amazon.com at 2.30%, and Alphabet at 2.11%.

overview.description: The Invesco Global Equity Net Zero ETF (IQSZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, investing in global companies with current or planned efforts to cut greenhouse gas emissions and align with the transition to a net zero economy. IQSZ was launched on Jul 16, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.
